sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: United Therapeutics CEO Martine Rothblatt sells $5.48m in shares
feed.summary: Martine A. Rothblatt, CEO of United Therapeutics Corp, sold approximately $5.48 million worth of shares on April 22, 2026, following the exercise of stock options, as part of a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. The company's stock is trading near its 52-week high, driven by strong fundamentals and promising advancements in its research and development pipeline. Recent analyst reports remain positive, with increased price targets due to the potential of its drug Tyvaso.

feed.title: VOO ETF Gains 0.8%
feed.summary: The VOO ETF experienced a gain of 0.8%. This brief information indicates a positive movement in the ETF's value.

feed.title: Edison International shareholders approve board nominees and key proposals
feed.summary: Edison International's shareholders have approved all eleven director nominees, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as their accounting firm, and approved executive compensation during their annual meeting. A proposal regarding equity retention failed to pass. Following the meeting, the board expanded to 12 members with the addition of M. Susan Hardwick as an independent director.

feed.title: U.S. Stocks: Dow Inc. Continues to Fall, Down 79 Dollars; Nasdaq Hits a New Record High (24th) ☆ Updated
feed.summary: Dow Inc. experienced a decline of $79, while the Nasdaq index reached a new record high on the 24th. This indicates a mixed performance in the U.S. stock market, with some sectors falling while others demonstrated strong growth.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems Inc. (CDNS) stock saw a strong trading day, gaining 1.48% to close at $302.26. This performance outpaced both the S&P 500's 0.91% increase and the technology sector's 1.25% gain. Despite its positive daily performance, the stock remains below its 52-week high.

feed.title: KLA Corp. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: This article states that KLA Corp. (KLAC) stock performed well, outperforming its competitors in the market on a particular trading day. The content of the article is not provided, stating "MSN" instead of actual content.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley cuts T. Rowe Price stock price target on AUM decline
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for T. Rowe Price Group shares to $105 from $107, maintaining an Equalweight rating, citing a decline in the company's assets under management. The firm adjusted its estimates after T. Rowe Price's March 2026 AUM disclosure showed lower-than-expected AUM and negative long-term net flows, leading to revised earnings per share estimates for 2026 and 2027. Despite the reduced price target, InvestingPro analysis suggests T. Rowe Price appears undervalued based on its Fair Value assessment.

feed.title: DTE to seek $473M rate hike but promises relief if data centers open
feed.summary: DTE Energy Co. plans to request a $473 million rate hike, nearly double the last approved increase. However, the utility promises not to seek another rate increase for at least two years if a major data center in Saline Township commences operation by the end of 2027. This move ties the highly-debated data center project to potential relief in energy bills for customers, with DTE arguing such centers help spread fixed costs and reduce residential burdens.

feed.title: See Garmin Rise on Big Money Buys
feed.summary: Shares of Garmin Ltd. (GRMN) have seen a significant rise, up 29% this year and 4,388% since its first institutional outlier inflow signal in 2002, driven by "Big Money" investor interest. The company reported record annual revenue of $7.25 billion in Q4 fiscal 2025, with strong sales and earnings growth. Its robust fundamentals and institutional support make GRMN a noteworthy stock, according to MoneyFlows data.

feed.title: CureVac sues Moderna for patent infringement over COVID-19 vaccines
feed.summary: German biotech company CureVac has filed a lawsuit against Moderna in Delaware federal court, alleging that Moderna's COVID-19 vaccine, Spikevax, infringes on CureVac's patents related to mRNA technology. CureVac is seeking royalties from Moderna's Spikevax sales as damages. This lawsuit is part of a broader trend of high-stakes patent disputes among biotech companies over COVID-19 vaccine technology.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt truck driver achieves five million safe miles
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. is celebrating truck driver Gary, who achieved five million safe miles during his 39-year career with the company. Gary, who started driving for J.B. Hunt in 1987, is only the fifth driver in the company's history to reach this incredible safety milestone. The company expressed immense pride and congratulations for his achievement.

feed.title: MeiraGTx raises $100M after reacquiring Johnson & Johnson eye drug
feed.summary: MeiraGTx has successfully raised $100 million in funding following its reacquisition of an eye drug from Johnson & Johnson. The article, published on April 24, 2026, details this significant financial move for the company.

feed.title: KB HOME, NEVADA GOVERNOR JOE LOMBARDO AND CITY OF HENDERSON MAYOR MICHELLE ROMERO CELEBRATE THE OPENING OF MERIDEN, A NEW LAS VEGAS-AREA MASTER PLAN
feed.summary: KB Home, in partnership with Nevada Governor Joe Lombardo and Henderson Mayor Michelle Romero, celebrated the opening of Meriden, a new master-planned community in Henderson, Nevada. This development introduces five new communities offering affordably priced homes, ranging from the mid-$300,000s, aimed at providing attainable housing options for Nevada families. The homes are designed for contemporary living with energy and water efficiency, located centrally with convenient access to major employment centers and attractions.

feed.title: IPG Photonics (IPGP) Price Forecast: Breakout Setup Ahead of Earnings
feed.summary: IPG Photonics (IPGP) is showing a potential breakout setup ahead of its 1Q 2026 earnings report on May 6. The stock has completed a Fibonacci retracement and formed a double bottom pattern, with increasing demand indicated by weekly performance and volume. An upside breakout above $131.20 could lead to targets near $169.41 and $186.71, aligning with a broader long-term bullish reversal signal.

feed.title: Tool maker Stanley Black & Decker adds $500M buyback, June payout
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) announced a regular second-quarter cash dividend of $0.83 per share, payable on June 23, 2026. The company's board also approved a new $500 million common stock repurchase authorization, which will expire 36 months after April 23, 2026, replacing a previous 20 million share authorization. This move signals a continued focus on shareholder returns and capital allocation following a recent business divestiture.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On April 24th, 433.61K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.52 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On April 24th, the options market for the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF saw significant activity, with 433.61K contracts traded. This robust trading volume indicates strong investor interest and speculative activity in this leveraged ETF. The open interest for the ETF stood at 1.52 million contracts, suggesting a large number of outstanding positions and potential future price movements.

feed.title: QQQ ETF Climbs 1.9%
feed.summary: The Invesco QQQ Trust (QQQ) ETF, which tracks the Nasdaq 100, saw an increase of 1.9% in its share price. This movement reflects the overall performance of the technology-heavy Nasdaq 100 index.

feed.title: Jefferies Financial Group (NYSE: JEF) prices $1.1B 5.125% notes due 2031
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group (NYSE: JEF) has priced an offering of $1.1 billion aggregate principal amount of 5.125% Senior Notes due April 28, 2031. The notes will bear interest semi-annually and are senior unsecured obligations ranking equally with other senior unsecured debt. The company intends to use the net proceeds, estimated at approximately $1.087 billion, for general corporate purposes and plans to list the notes on the NYSE.

feed.title: Castle Biosciences (NASDAQ: CSTL) CEO sells 4,172 shares via trusts
feed.summary: Castle Biosciences CEO Derek Maetzold sold a total of 4,172 shares of common stock at a weighted-average price of $25.098 per share on April 21, 2026, as part of a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Concurrently, Maetzold exercised stock options to acquire 550 shares at $2.39 per share, selling a matching number of shares. After these transactions, Maetzold directly holds 21,479 shares, with additional indirect holdings through various family trusts.

feed.title: Hormel Foods (HRL) Completes Sale of Whole-Bird Turkey Business
feed.summary: Hormel Foods (HRL) has finalized the sale of its whole-bird turkey operations to Life-Science Innovations, including a production facility and related assets. This strategic move aims to shift Hormel's focus towards value-added protein offerings and reduce reliance on volatile commodity markets, enhancing profitability and operational efficiency. The company retains its JENNIE-O brand and continues to diversify its product portfolio across U.S. retail, foodservice, and international channels.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Upgrades Harmony Gold (HMY) to Overweight
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has upgraded Harmony Gold Mining Company Limited (NYSE:HMY) to Overweight from Equal Weight, raising its price target due to a higher gold price forecast and the company's relative underperformance providing a valuation buffer. Harmony Gold reported a 20% year-over-year revenue increase and revised its dividend policy to return up to 50% of net free cash to investors. The company is involved in mineral exploration and processing across several regions.

feed.title: UBS AG (AMUB) offers autocallable notes linked to Alphabet Class C shares
feed.summary: UBS AG has introduced Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Alphabet Inc.'s Class C stock, with a trade date of April 24, 2026, and an expected maturity of April 28, 2027. These notes offer periodic contingent coupons if the underlying asset's closing level meets or exceeds a coupon barrier, and they can be automatically called early if the underlying reaches its initial level. Investors face the risk of losing most or all of their principal if the notes are not called and the final level drops below a specified downside threshold, and payments are subject to UBS's credit risk.

feed.title: EQT Maintained by UBS -- Price Target Lowered to $74.00
feed.summary: UBS analyst Josh Silverstein has maintained a Buy rating on EQT, although the price target has been slightly lowered from $75.00 to $74.00. EQT is currently considered 0.8% overvalued according to GuruFocus's GF Value™ and has a GF Score™ of 79, indicating strong potential for long-term returns. Insider activity shows $3.5 million in shares sold over the last three months with no insider purchases.

feed.title: Fund Update: 1,398,774 HUMANA (HUM) shares added to PZENA INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT LLC portfolio
feed.summary: PZENA INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT LLC has increased its holdings in Humana (HUM) by 1,398,774 shares, as per a recent SEC 13F filing for the Q1 2026 report period. The article details other significant institutional investor activities, insider trading, congressional trading, and recent analyst ratings and price targets for Humana stock.

feed.title: BlackRock holds 29.3M Kimberly-Clark shares (NYSE: KMB) as of 03/31/2026
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A, reporting beneficial ownership of 29,295,775 shares of Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NYSE: KMB) common stock as of March 31, 2026. This stake represents 8.8% of Kimberly-Clark's class of securities. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 27,170,900 shares and sole dispositive power over all 29,295,775 shares.

feed.title: HCI Group sets June 18 payout for 40-cent quarterly dividend
feed.summary: HCI Group (NYSE: HCI) has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per common share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. HCI Group is a diversified holding company primarily engaged in insurance, reinsurance, real estate, claims services, and insurance technology.

feed.title: BlackRock (NASDAQ: HFWA) holds 5.46M shares, 13.3% stake
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment on Schedule 13G/A, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 5,464,986 shares of Heritage Financial Corp (HFWA) common stock, which represents a 13.3% stake. The filing indicates BlackRock holds significant sole voting power over 5,408,228 shares and sole dispositive power over all 5,464,986 shares. The report also notes that iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF has an interest exceeding 5% in HFWA.

feed.title: Citizens Financial (NYSE: CFG) director receives 2,608 RSUs grant
feed.summary: Tracy A. Atkinson, a director at Citizens Financial Group (NYSE: CFG), was granted 2,608 restricted stock units (RSUs) as compensation, as reported in a recent Form 4 filing. This award, granted under the company's 2014 Non-Employee Directors Compensation Plan, increased her direct holdings to 12,543.719 shares. The grant was an equity award for a non-employee director and not an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Citizens Financial (NYSE: CFG) grants director 2,608 RSUs
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group director Michele N. Siekerka was granted 2,608 shares as a restricted stock unit award under the company's 2014 Non-Employee Directors Compensation Plan. Following this award, her direct holdings increased to 66,159.978 shares of common stock, with additional indirect holdings through family members and an IRA. The transaction is compensation-related rather than a market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Citizens Financial (NYSE: CFG) director receives 2,608-share stock unit grant
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group director Christine M. Cumming was granted 2,608 shares of Common Stock as restricted stock units under the Amended & Restated Citizens Financial Group, Inc. 2014 Non-Employee Directors Compensation Plan. This transaction, which reflects a grant/award acquisition with no cash payment, increases her direct holdings to 52,341.017 shares of CFG common stock. The grant was reported on April 23, 2026, via an SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Is Ituran Location and Control Ltd. (ITRN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article summarizes a bullish thesis on Ituran Location and Control Ltd. (ITRN), highlighting its strong Q4 2025 earnings, accelerating subscriber growth, and emerging data-driven opportunities. Despite its strong performance and recurring revenue model, the article suggests that some AI stocks may offer higher and quicker returns for investors. It notes that ITRN is not among the 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines SVP granted 740 restricted shares | DAL Insider Trading
feed.summary: Julia Ann McConnell, Senior Vice President, Controller, and Chief Accounting Officer at Delta Air Lines (DAL), was granted 740 restricted shares as part of the company's 2026 long-term incentive program. These shares, valued at $0.00 per share, were approved by the Personnel & Compensation Committee and will vest according to an award agreement. Following this grant, McConnell directly holds 18,728 shares of Delta common stock.

feed.title: Ford Rejects Claim of US-Focused Talks With Geely
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. has denied recent reports of discussions with Geely Automobile Holdings regarding technology and platform sharing for the U.S. market. While Ford acknowledges ongoing talks with Geely concerning the potential use of an underutilized plant in Spain, it explicitly states that no discussions involve the U.S. market. The prospect of Chinese automakers entering the U.S. market faces significant barriers due to tariffs and opposition from U.S. executives, who view them as an existential threat.

feed.title: Stifel Lowers General Mills (GIS) Target, Sees Slower Sales Growth Ahead
feed.summary: Stifel lowered its price target for General Mills (GIS) to $40 from $44 but reiterated a Buy rating, citing pressure on food group earnings due to weak volume growth, compressing margins from reinvestment needs, and potentially slower sales growth. BTIG also initiated coverage with a Neutral rating, expressing concerns about growth fundamentals, the "Remarkability playbook," a levered balance sheet, and valuation relative to peers. General Mills is a global manufacturer of branded consumer foods.

feed.title: Is Republic Services, Inc. (RSG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article examines Republic Services, Inc. (RSG) as a potential investment, summarizing a bullish thesis from Investomine's Substack. It highlights RSG's strong FY2025 performance, characterized by revenue growth, margin expansion, and robust free cash flow generation, driven by pricing power and disciplined cost control. Despite these positives, the article concludes by noting that RSG is not among the 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds and suggests that certain AI stocks might offer greater return potential.

feed.title: Michael Richards Sells 3,000 Shares of State Street (NYSE:STT) Stock
feed.summary: Michael Richards, EVP of State Street Corporation, sold 3,000 shares of company stock on April 22nd, 2026, for a total of $461,670, reducing his stake by 6.45%. This transaction comes as State Street exceeded quarterly earnings expectations with an EPS of $2.84 and a 15.6% year-over-year revenue increase. The company also pays a quarterly dividend of $0.84 per share, translating to a 2.2% yield.

feed.title: Autodesk nominates Pearson CEO Omar Abbosh to board By Investing.com
feed.summary: Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK) has announced the nomination of Omar Abbosh, current CEO of Pearson, to its Board of Directors as an independent director. Abbosh's experience in technology, strategy, and business transformation, particularly with AI in SaaS, is expected to be highly valuable. Stephen Milligan, who served on the audit committee, will not stand for re-election, maintaining the board at 11 directors with 10 independents.

feed.title: Large preferred deal and pay package in Infinity Natural (NYSE: INR) 2026 proxy
feed.summary: Infinity Natural Resources (NYSE: INR) has issued its 2026 definitive proxy statement, detailing the upcoming annual stockholder meeting on June 9, 2026. Key items for approval include the election of eight directors, advisory votes on executive compensation, and the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as the 2026 auditor. A significant proposal involves the approval of issuing Class A common stock upon the conversion of $350 million in recently issued Series A Convertible Preferred Stock to Quantum Capital Group and Carnelian Energy Capital, which carries an 8% dividend stepping up to 12% after five years and grants substantial voting power to the sponsors. The proxy also discloses 2025 executive compensation, with CEO Zack Arnold and CFO David Sproule receiving approximately $38.9 million each, largely from equity-based awards tied to long-term performance.

feed.title: iHuman posts 2025 Form 20-F, offers free audited hard copies
feed.summary: iHuman Inc. (NYSE: IH) announced it filed its 2025 annual report on Form 20-F with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on April 24, 2026, for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The report, including audited financial statements, is available on the company's investor relations website. Shareholders and American Depositary Share (ADS) holders can also request a free hard copy by contacting iHuman's Beijing office.

feed.title: Thad Trent sells shares under 10b5-1 (ON)
feed.summary: Thad Trent, an insider at ON Semiconductor Corp (ON), reported multiple Rule 144 sales of common stock under pre-arranged 10b5-1 plans. The sales, totaling 120,000 shares for over $9 million, occurred on various dates in February and April 2026, with securities originating from RSUs and PSUs granted in 2022. These sales are considered neutral in impact and sentiment according to the filing analysis.

feed.title: Liberty Broadband Stock Plunges 26% as Charter Earnings Jolt Merger Bet
feed.summary: Liberty Broadband's shares dropped approximately 26% after Charter Communications reported higher-than-expected internet subscriber losses in its first quarter, directly impacting Liberty due to a pending all-stock merger. Liberty holders are set to receive Charter shares, meaning Liberty's value is closely tied to Charter's stock performance. The decline highlights market concerns over Charter's broadband subscriber retention and the implications for the merger's ultimate value to Liberty shareholders.

feed.title: Record 2025 lifts IMAX (NYSE: IMAX) as it sets 2026 virtual AGM vote
feed.summary: IMAX Corporation announced record financial results for 2025, including global box office revenue of $1.28 billion and a 44% total shareholder return. The company is holding its virtual Annual General Meeting on June 10, 2026, where shareholders will vote on the election of ten directors, the appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as independent auditors, and an advisory say-on-pay resolution for executive compensation. Executive bonuses topped target, and 2023 PSUs vested at 165% of target, reflecting strong multi-year performance.

feed.title: Nessel calls DTE rate pause proposal a ‘ransom note’
feed.summary: Michigan Attorney General Dana Nessel has labeled DTE Energy's proposal for a two-year rate increase pause as a "ransom note," expressing skepticism about the utility's conditions. DTE stated it would refrain from filing new rate requests until at least 2028, provided its controversial Saline Township data center project moves forward. Nessel argues that the benefits of such projects for consumers have not been proven and that the utility's offer is contingent on multiple approvals, not a firm commitment.

feed.title: More California homeowners get coverage options as Travelers expands
feed.summary: Travelers (NYSE: TRV) announced its voluntary participation in California’s Sustainable Insurance Strategy, expanding homeowners insurance availability. This strategy allows insurers to use forward-looking wildfire catastrophe models and reinsurance costs in rates, alongside plans to write in high-risk communities. Travelers is also increasing discounts for homeowners who invest in wildfire mitigation improvements, such as ember-resistant vents and Class A roofing.

feed.title: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) affiliate files Form 144 to sell 37,791 shares
feed.summary: An Equifax Inc. affiliate has filed a Form 144 notice to sell 37,791 shares of common stock on April 24, 2026. The shares are related to an option granted on May 4, 2018, and the transaction is described as a cash sale on the NYSE. Form 144 is a notice of intent to sell and does not confirm the execution of the sale, which would be verified by subsequent filings.

feed.title: AES (AES) grants 44,483 RSUs to EVP and General Counsel Freedman
feed.summary: Paul L. Freedman, EVP and General Counsel of AES CORP, received an equity award of 44,483 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) under the company's 2025 Equity and Incentive Compensation Plan. These RSUs will vest in three annual installments starting April 23, 2027, provided he remains employed. Following this award, Freedman directly holds 223,154 AES Common Stock shares and 3,130 indirectly through a 401(k) plan.

feed.title: [Form 4] AES CORP Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: AES Corp's EVP and CFO, Stephen Coughlin, was granted 50,345 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) under the company's 2025 Equity and Incentive Compensation Plan. These RSUs will vest in three annual installments starting April 23, 2027, and will convert into common stock upon vesting. This transaction, a grant rather than a purchase, increases his direct holdings to 265,494 shares.

feed.title: S&P Global shareholders will vote online May 20 at 8:30 a.m. EDT
feed.summary: S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) announced that its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders will be held virtually on May 20, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. EDT. Shareholders can vote and submit questions online using a unique control number, and a webcast replay will be available for one year. The meeting will be presided over by Lord Ian Livingston and feature remarks and a Q&A session with President and CEO Martina Cheung.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Southern (SO) Could Change Following Its 25th Straight Dividend Hike - Learn Why
feed.summary: Southern Company (SO) recently announced its 25th consecutive annual dividend increase to US$0.76 per share quarterly, raising its annualized payout to US$3.04. This demonstrates the company's commitment to consistent cash returns for investors. However, the article highlights that Southern's investment narrative continues to depend on regulatory approvals for new power generation and the management of rising capital costs and potential equity issuance.

feed.title: Boston Scientific Corp Stock (BSX) Closed Down by 5.56% on Apr 24: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Boston Scientific Corp (BSX) stock closed down 5.56% on April 24th due to a lowered full-year 2026 guidance, despite beating Q1 2026 estimates. The guidance reduction was attributed to unforeseen hurdles in key segments like WATCHMAN, U.S. Electrophysiology, and Urology, as well as macro uncertainty and tariffs. Furthermore, a class-action lawsuit alleging misleading statements regarding the U.S. EP segment's growth rate added to negative market sentiment.
